scripts.build: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run build -w @gamepulse/api && npm run build -w @gamepulse/web && npm run build -w @gamepulse/userscript
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run build -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run dev -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run dist -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && concurrently -n api,worker,web "npm run dev -w @gamepulse/api" "npm run worker -w @gamepulse/api" "npm run dev -w @gamepulse/web"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/api && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/web && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/desktop
